notes.heading: First install now asks for required server info
notes.body: Before install or start, the app now prompts for your Dragonwilds Owner ID, Server Name, Default World Name, and Admin Password so the dedicated server can actually boot.

notes.heading: DedicatedServer.ini is generated correctly
notes.body: The app writes the official WindowsServer DedicatedServer.ini section and keys for you, including the optional World Password when you choose to set one.

notes.heading: Existing configs are detected
notes.body: If your server already has a DedicatedServer.ini, the app reads the official values from it so Health Check does not falsely report setup as missing.
